subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast journeyed in the path of God! The letter which thou didst address to his honour Haji was perused [3.5s]... ...O Lord! Guard Thou the children that are born in Thy day, are nurtured at the breast of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سافر فی سبیل الله مراسله که بجناب حاجی مرقوم فرموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @education of children; moral education, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
